name: subtelomere_architecture
description: Subtelomeric architecture in S. pombe. Immediately interior to the telomere TTAC(C/G)(0-1)(C/G)(1-8) array lies a ~50 kb gene-poor subtelomeric domain enriched for the tlh1/tlh2 helicase paralogs, SPAC* and SPBC* lineage-specific genes, and Tf2 LTR insertions. On chr III the subtelomere is replaced by the rDNA array. Subtelomeres are silenced via Clr4/H3K9me and Swi6-HP1 chromatin.

architecture.internal_structure: ~50 kb subtelomeric domain with tlh1/tlh2 helicase paralogs, SPAC/SPBC lineage genes, Tf2 LTR fragments; chrIII subtelomere replaced by rDNA
